LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT SIGNATURE GROUP HOLDINGS, INC., SUCCESSOR IN INTEREST TO FREMONT REORGANIZING CORPORATION FKA FREMONT INVESTMENT & LOAN'S DEMURRER TO THE FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT - DEFENDANT'S DEMURRER TO THE 1ST CAUSE OF ACTION (DECLARATORY RELIEF) IS SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND. THIS CLAIM IS THE SUBJECT OF CLAIMS THAT ALREADY EXIST IN THE COMPLAINT AND CANNOT BE USED TO GIVE PLAINTIFF A SECOND CAUSE OF ACTION FOR DETERMINATION OF IDENTICAL ISSUES. THE DEMURRER TO THE 2ND CAUSE OF ACTION (CCC 2923.52 (CFPA)) IS SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND. THIS STATUTE HAS BEEN REPEALED. THE DEMURRER TO THE 3RD CAUSE OF ACTION (FRAUD) IS SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND. PLAINTIFF MUST PLEA FACTS WITH PARTICULARITY TO SUPPORT A CLAIM OF FRAUD. PLAINTIFF MUST ALSO PLEAD FACTS WHICH STATE WHY THIS CLAIM FALLS WITHIN THE ESTABLISHED TIME LIMITATIONS. THE DEMURRER TO THE 4TH CAUSE OF ACTION (IMPLIED GOOD FAITH AND FAIR DEALING) IS SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND. PLAINTIFF NEEDS TO REMOVE THE TORT RECOVERY ALLEGATIONS AND ALLEGE BREACH OF SOME FUNDAMENTAL STATE POLICY FOLLOWING EXECUTION OF THE K, NOT BEFORE. PLAINTIFF MUST ALSO PLEAD FACTS WHICH STATE WHY THIS CLAIM FALLS WITHIN THE ESTABLISHED TIME LIMITATIONS. THE DEMURRER TO THE 5TH CAUSE OF ACTION (UNFAIR BUSINESS PRACTICE) IS SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND. PLAINTIFF MUST MORE SPECIFICALLY PLEAD FACT AND THE ACTUAL PRACTICES THAT WERE FRAUDULENT, UNLAWFUL OR UNFAIR AND WHO ACTUALLY COMMITTED THE PRACTICES. THE DEMURRER TO THE 6TH CAUSE OF ACTION (CCC 1918.5 - 1921.1920) IS SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND. THIS IS BARRED BY THE STATUTE OF LIMITATIONS. THE DEMURRER TO THE 7TH CAUSE OF ACTION (BREACH OF FIDUCIARY DUTY) IS SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND. THE LENDER/BORROWER RELATIONSHIP IS NOT FIDUCIARY IN NATURE. (**SEE NEXT ENTRY FOR CONTINUATION OF RULING.**)

PROOF OF SERVICE BY MAIL FILED BY DEFENDANT SIGNATURE GROUP HOLDINGS, INC., SUCCESSOR IN INTEREST TO FREMONT REORGANIZING CORPORATION FKA FREMONT INVESTMENT & LOAN

LAW AND MOTION, DEFENDANTS LITTON LOAN SERVICING LP AND MORTGAGE ELECTRONIC REGISTRATION SYSTEMS, INC.'S DEMURRER TO FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT. NO APPEARANCE ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING - DEFENDANTS' DEMURRER TO THE 1ST CAUSE OF ACTION (DECLARATORY RELIEF) IS SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND. BECAUSE THE CAUSE OF ACTION FOR MISREPRESENTATION FAILS (SEE BELOW), THIS CAUSE OF ACTION FAILS AS WELL. DEFENDANTS' DEMURRER TO THE 2ND CAUSE OF ACTION (VIOLATION OF CC 2923.52) IS SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND. PLAINTIFF CONCEDES THAT THERE IS NO PRIVATE RIGHT OF ACTION. DEFENDANTS' DEMURRER TO THE 3RD CAUSE OF ACTION (FRAUD AND MISREPRESENTATION) IS SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND. AS PLED, THIS CAUSE OF ACTION IS ENTIRELY CONCLUSORY AND RELIES ON THE VAGUE ALLEGATIONS SET OUT IN THE FACTUAL BACKGROUND" SECTION OF THE FAC. PLAINTIFF HAS NOT STATED WITH ANY FACTUAL SPECIFICITY THE ELEMENTS FOR FRAUD AS TO THE PARTICULAR DEFENDANTS. DEFENDANTS' DEMURRER TO THE 4TH CAUSE OF ACTION (BREACH OF IMPLIED COVENANT OF GOOD FAITH AND FAIR DEALING) IS SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND. PLAINTIFF HAS NOT PLED ALL OF THE REQUISITE ELEMENTS INCLUDING THAT THERE WAS A CONTRACT BETWEEN THE PLAINTIFF AND THESE DEFENDANTS. FURTHERMORE, THE ONLY ALLEGED BASES FOR THIS CLAIM ARE ACTIONS THAT TOOK PLACE AT OR BEFORE THE TIME THE CONTRACT WAS ENTERED. PLAINTIFF MUST PLEAD FACTS SHOWING THESE DEFENDANTS UNFAIRLY INTERFERED WITH PLAINTIFF'S RIGHT TO RECEIVE THE BENEFIT OF THE CONTRACT AFTER THE CONTRACT WAS ENTERED. DEFENDANTS' DEMURRER TO THE 5TH CAUSE OF ACTION (VIOLATION OF CC 1981.5 - 1921) IS SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND. THIS CAUSE OF ACTION ARISES SOLELY OUT OF ALLEGATION REGARDING THE LOAN ORIGINATION. THESE DEFENDANTS ARE NOT ALLEGED TO HAVE HAD ANY INVOLVEMENT IN THE ORIGINATION. PLAINTIFF MUST PLEAD FACTS SHOWING A VIOLATION BY THESE DEFENDANTS. SEE MINUTES ON THIS DATE FOR THE ALL RULINGS. (302)

TENDER MUST BE PLED WHERE A MORTGAGER SEEKS TO SET ASIDE A VOIDABLE SALE. PLAINTIFF HAS FAILED TO MENTION TENDER. THE DEMURRER TO THE 9TH CAUSE OF ACTION (AIDING AND ABETTING) IS SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND. PLAINTIFF NEEDS TO PLEAD FACTS TO THE SUPPORT THE ELEMENTS OF THE CLAIM AND WHY IT FALLS WITHIN THE ESTABLISHED TIME LIMITATIONS. THE DEMURRER TO THE 10TH CAUSE OF ACTION (PREDATORY LENDING) IS SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND. IT FAILS TO ALLEGE ANY JOINT LIABILITY AND IS BARRED BY THE STATUTE OF LIMITATIONS. DEMURRER TO 2ND AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Oct-04-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. ADAM N. BARASCH OF SEVERSON & WERSON, TEL. NO. 677-5533 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANTS LITTON LOAN SERVICING LP AND MORTGAGE ELECTRONIC REGISTRATION SYSTEMS;
ATTY. LINDSAY ALEXANDRA JESTER OF BUCHALTER/NEMER, TEL. NO. 227-0900 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANT SIGNATURE GROUP HOLDINGS, INCORPORATED.

RULING - THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: DEFENDANT MORTGAGE ELECTRONIC REGISTRATION SYSTEMS, INC. AND LITTON LOAN SERVICING LP'S DEMURRER TO 2ND AMENDED COMPLAINT is sustained without leave to amend. Plaintiff failed to plead facts to support an application of the discovery rule or another exception to the statute of limitations to overcome the statute of limitations defense as to all causes of action. Plaintiff also failed to plead facts showing that defendants unfairly interfered with plaintiff's right to receive the benefits of the contract after the contact was entered. ORDER AND JUDGMENT SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Harold Kahn, Reporter: LaVena Ward, CSR # 7077 = (302/HEK)

No Opposition was filed and the First Amended Complaint does not provide a factual basis to support the claim for punitive damages. Defendant to prepare a proposed form of order (may include this ruling in proposed order on companion demurrer). (302/LMG) Judge: Loretta M. Giorgi, Reporter: Joanne Farrell, CSR #4838

Defendant Signature Group Holdings, Inc., Successor In Interest To Fremont Reorganizing Corporation Fka Fremont Investment & Loan Demurrer To The First Amended Complaint (Per Ex Parte Order)
Off Calendar Jun-10-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
DEFENDANT SIGNATURE GROUP HOLDINGS, INC., SUCCESSOR IN INTEREST TO FREMONT REORGANIZING CORPORATION FKA FREMONT INVESTMENT & LOAN'S DEMURRER TO THE FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT.

APPEARANCES: Joseph A. Lepera, Esq. of Lepera & Associates, PC 215-1001 for pltf & opposing party; no other appearances.

RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling - Defendant's Demurrer to the 1st cause of action (declaratory relief) is sustained without leave to amend. This claim is the subject of claims that already exist in the complaint and cannot be used to give plaintiff a second cause of action for determination of identical issues.
The Demurrer to the 2nd cause of action (CCC 2923.52 (CFPA)) is sustained without leave to amend. This statute has been repealed.
The Demurrer to the 3rd cause of action (Fraud) is sustained with leave to amend. Plaintiff must plea facts with particularity to support a claim of fraud. Plaintiff must also plead facts which state why this claim falls within the established time limitations.
The Demurrer to the 4th cause of action (implied good faith and fair dealing) is sustained with leave to amend. Plaintiff needs to remove the tort recovery allegations and allege breach of some fundamental state policy following execution of the K, not before. Plaintiff must also plead facts which state why this claim falls within the established time limitations.
The Demurrer to the 5th cause of action (unfair business practice) is sustained with leave to amend. Plaintiff must more specifically plead fact and the actual practices that were fraudulent, unlawful or unfair and who actually committed the practices.
The Demurrer to the 6th cause of action (CCC 1918.5 - 1921.1920) is sustained without leave to amend. This is barred by the Statute of Limitations.
The Demurrer to the 7th cause of action (Breach of Fiduciary Duty) is sustained without leave to amend. The lender/borrower relationship is not fiduciary in nature.
The Demurrer to the 8th cause of action (Quiet Title) is sustained with leave to amend. Tender must be pled where a mortgager seeks to set aside a voidable sale. Plaintiff has failed to mention tender.
The Demurrer to the 9th cause of action (Aiding and Abetting) is sustained with leave to amend. Plaintiff needs to plead facts to the support the elements of the claim and why it falls within the established time limitations.
The Demurrer to the 10th cause of action (Predatory Lending) is sustained without leave to amend. It fails to allege any joint liability and is barred by the Statute of Limitations.
The Demurrer to the 11th cause of action (Unconscionability) is sustained without leave to amend. This is a defense, not a cause of action.
The Demurrer to the 12th cause of action (TILA Violation) is sustained without leave to amend. This claim is barred under the Statute of Limitations.
In addition, the Court stated that plaintiff has 30 days from notice of entry of order to file the amended complaint. Defendant to prepare a proposed form of order. (302/LMG) Judge: Loretta M. Giorgi, Reporter: Joanne Farrell, CSR #4838

****(RULING VACATED PER 5/11/2011 EX PARTE ORDER)****

DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Apr-08-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
DEFENDANTS LITTON LOAN SERVICING LP AND MORTGAGE ELECTRONIC REGISTRATION SYSTEMS, INC.'S DEMURRER TO FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT.

RULING: No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling - Defendants' Demurrer to the 1st cause of action (Declaratory relief) is sustained with leave to amend. Because the cause of action for misrepresentation fails (see below), this cause of action fails as well.
Defendants' Demurrer to the 2nd cause of action (Violation of CC 2923.52) is sustained without leave to amend. Plaintiff concedes that there is no private right of action.
Defendants' Demurrer to the 3rd cause of action (Fraud and Misrepresentation) is sustained with leave to amend. As pled, this cause of action is entirely conclusory and relies on the vague allegations set out in the factual Background" section of the FAC. Plaintiff has not stated with any factual specificity the elements for fraud as to the particular defendants.
Defendants' demurrer to the 4th cause of action (breach of Implied Covenant of Good Faith and Fair Dealing) is sustained with leave to amend. Plaintiff has not pled all of the requisite elements including that there was a contract between the plaintiff and these defendants. Furthermore, the only alleged bases for this claim are actions that took place at or before the time the contract was entered. Plaintiff must plead facts showing these defendants unfairly interfered with Plaintiff's right to receive the benefit of the contract after the contract was entered.
Defendants' demurrer to the 5th cause of action (Violation of CC 1981.5 - 1921) is sustained with leave to amend. This cause of action arises solely out of allegation regarding the loan origination. These defendants are not alleged to have had any involvement in the origination. Plaintiff must plead facts showing a violation by these defendants.
Defendants' demurrer to the 7th cause of action (Breach of Fiduciary Duty) is sustained with leave to amend. Plaintiff fails to state facts showing that a fiduciary duty was owed by these defendants or how it was breached.
Defendants' demurrer to the 8th cause of action (Quiet Title) is sustained with leave to amend. Plaintiff has not tendered in his complaint, nor addressed the issue of tender at all. Plaintiff should plead tender or state facts showing why tender should not be required. Plaintiff should also state the adverse claims to title of plaintiff as to these defendants.
Defendants' demurrer to the 9th cause of action (Aiding and Abetting) is sustained with leave to amend. Plaintiff fails to show that any action of these defendants were actually illegal. This cause of action cannot stand without a predicate cause of action.
Defendants' demurrer to the 10th cause of action (Predatory Lending) is sustained without leave to amend. This is not a cause of action. Because it is premised on other causes of action it is duplicative and unnecessary.
Defendants' demurrer to the 11th cause of action (Unconscionability) is sustained without leave to amend. This is not a cause of action.
Defendants' demurrer to the 12th cause of action (Violation of TILA) and all other causes of action based on a violation of the Statute of Limitations is sustained with leave to amend. Plaintiff must plead sufficient facts to support an application of the discovery rule to overcome the Statute of Limitation defense for these causes of action including the time and manner of discovery and plaintiff's inability to have earlier discovery despite reasonable diligence.
(PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE ORDER.)
(302/LMG) Judge: Loretta M. Giorgi, Reporter: Karla Ellis-Davis, CSR #12998
